content.content: It looks like www.redscalar.com has released a new version of their application file. Please download the latest version to /downloads and then upload it to the root directory of the emmajohnson/file_compression GitHub repository.

<function_thought>
The user has requested to download the latest version of a file from www.redscalar.com and then upload that file to a specific GitHub repository. According to the trajectory plan, the first step is to browse the webpage to find the file for download.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[browse_webpage(url="http://www.redscalar.com")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
